title: Remove italics everywhere
notes: The Skimm uses almost no italics — everything is upright and direct. This strips italic from headlines, the hero box, the last word quote, and the quote-of-day block. Makes the whole newsletter feel less 'magazine editorial' and more 'smart friend texting you'.

title: Clean section headers — hide number badges
notes: The Skimm uses plain bold category labels with a simple colored bar, no numbered circles. This hides the circle badges and replaces them with a cleaner rouge left-border style, giving sections a more editorial-paper feel.

title: Injection Report: Skimm-style beat labels
notes: Replace the large Playfair Display serif headline with a compact sans-serif title. The beat labels (What's going on / What it means / What's next) become inline ALL-CAPS pill tags — same pattern The Skimm uses for THE BREAKDOWN / WHY WE CARE / WHAT'S NEXT.

title: Quick Hits: card layout with label tags
notes: Instead of an emoji + inline label, each Quick Hit becomes a small card with a colored category tag sitting above the body text. Cleaner visual separation, easier to scan. Removes the emoji column entirely — the tag does that work.
